title: Thaliyil Mahadeva temple
tagline: Thaliyil Mahadeva temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Talikotta Mahadeva Temple or Thaliyil Mahadeva Temple, an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva is located on the banks of Meenachil River on Kottayam - Kumarakom Road in Kottaya
overview.description: Talikotta Mahadeva Temple or Thaliyil Mahadeva Temple, an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva is located on the banks of Meenachil River on Kottayam - Kumarakom Road in Kottayam District in Kerala state in India. The Keezhtali Mahadeva Temple is one of the important temples in Thekkumkur Kingdom. According to folklore, sage Parashurama has installed the idol of Shiva. The temple is a part of the 108 Shiva Temples in Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thazhathangady Juma Mosque
topPlaces.description: The Thazhathangady Juma Masjid is a mosque situated in Thazhathangady, in the district of Kottayam, in one of the heritage zones of the state of Kerala, India, The mosque is located adjacent to the Meenachil River. Completed in c. 824 CE, the mosque is one of the oldest mosques in India.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Church, Kottayam, commonly known as Kottayam Cheriapally, is a Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church located in Kottayam, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Malloossery
topPlaces.description: Malloossery is a small village in Kottayam district of Kerala state, south India. It is close to Kottayam.

topPlaces.name: Kummanam
topPlaces.description: Kummanam is a village that lies on either side of river Meenachil. Administratively it is in Thiruvarpu and Aymanam Gramapanchayat of Kottayam district in Kerala State, India.

topPlaces.name: Veloor, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Veloor is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Kottayam (IPA: [ko:ʈ:ajam]) is a city in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is the district headquarters of the district and is located about 151 km (93.8 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Mar Thoma Syrian Theological Seminary, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: The Mar Thoma Syrian Theological Seminary is an Oriental Protestant Seminary, established in 1926 in Kottayam, Kerala, to train clergy for the Mar Thoma Syrian Church. The seminary has been affiliated with Senate of Serampore College (University).

image.alt: Mar Thoma Syrian Theological Seminary, Kottayam

topPlaces.name: Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: The Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral, also known as the Vimalagiri Cathedral or as Angathattu Palli located at Kottayam is the cathedral of the Diocese of Vijayapuram. Built in the Gothic architectural style, the church has a 172-foot tall tower which is one of the tallest church towers in Kerala.

image.alt: Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral, Kottayam

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thaliyil Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thaliyil Mahadeva temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thaliyil Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (63 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (48 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thaliyil Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thaliyil Mahadeva temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thaliyil Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thaliyil Mahadeva temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thaliyil Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thazhathangady Juma Mosque, St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Kottayam, Malloossery, Kummanam, Veloor, Kottayam.
